lines.speaker: minotaur
lines.text: So... the labyrinth spits up another lamb.

lines.speaker: minotaur
lines.text: I've worn the bones of a hundred heroes. What makes you any different?

lines.speaker: theseus
lines.text: I didn't come down here to be different.

lines.speaker: theseus
lines.text: I came to finish what Athens started.

lines.speaker: minotaur
lines.text: Brave words. Let's see if the sword behind them is just as loud.
